models.hubTitle: LLM Model Pricing & Cost Comparison 2025 | GateCtr
models.hubDescription: Compare pricing, context windows, and speed for GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini, Mistral, and more. See how GateCtr reduces your LLM bill by up to 40%.
models.subtitle: Compare input/output costs, context windows, and speed across all major LLM providers.
models.savingsSubtitle: GateCtr compresses prompts by up to 40% before they reach the LLM. Here's what that means for your bill.

compare.hubDescription: Side-by-side price, speed, and context window comparisons for the most popular LLM pairs. Find the cheapest model for your use case.
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side pricing, speed, and context window comparisons for the most popular model pairs.
compare.cheaperFor: Which is cheaper for my use case?

integrations.hubTitle: GateCtr Integrations — Connect Any LLM Framework | GateCtr
integrations.hubDescription: Step-by-step guides to integrate GateCtr with OpenAI SDK, LangChain, Vercel AI SDK, LlamaIndex, and more. One base URL change. Full cost control.
integrations.subtitle: Connect GateCtr to your existing stack in under 2 minutes. One base URL change. No other code changes.
integrations.underTheHood: What GateCtr does under the hood for {framework}
integrations.underTheHoodBody: When you route {framework} calls through GateCtr, every request is automatically compressed (up to 40% fewer tokens), scored for complexity (to select the optimal model), and checked against your budget cap before reaching the LLM provider. You get full observability — tokens, cost, latency — in the GateCtr dashboard.

learn.hubTitle: LLM Cost Glossary — Key Terms Explained | GateCtr
learn.hubDescription: Definitions for token optimization, prompt compression, LLM routing, budget caps, and 15+ other key concepts in AI cost infrastructure.
learn.subtitle: Clear definitions for the key concepts in AI cost infrastructure, token optimization, and LLM routing.
